stemHtml: RUSHAIR 123 receives CPDLC "CLIMB TO FL410". Seconds later, voice: "DISREGARD CPDLC CLIMB MESSAGE, BREAK, CLIMB FL380." What should they do?

options.a: Send WILCO via CPDLC and climb to FL410.
options.b: Send STANDBY via CPDLC and wait.
options.c: Disregard the voice, read back and climb to FL410.
options.d: Disregard the CPDLC, read back the voice instruction, climb to FL380.
